title: agrostis gigantea subsp. gigantea
intro: Agrostis gigantea subsp. gigantea, also known as tall fescue, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of tall fescue include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, tall fescue is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
